name: OutboundIQ — API Intelligence Platform
about: A real-time API monitoring platform that detects third-party API failures before they affect end users. Correlates provider status pages with live transaction data using AI. Built the Laravel monitoring engine, integrated Grok LLM for provider health analysis, and published the laravel-outboundiq SDK reducing integration setup time by 60%.

name: Edo Specialist Hospital — Clinical Accounting System
liveLabel: Client Project · Demo Available on Request
about: Custom double-entry accounting platform built for a 200-bed government hospital to replace Sage accounting software. Includes full procurement workflows, automated ledger posting, financial reporting (P&L, balance sheet, trial balance), and real-time sync with the hospital's e-clinic system.

name: EVE — Online Event Ticketing Platform
about: A full event ticketing platform where users can register, create events, add speakers, and purchase tickets. Built the entire frontend, integrating with an AdonisJS REST API for auth, event management, and ticket transactions. Collaborative project — I owned the frontend, backend was built by another developer using AdonisJS.

name: Acme Dashboard
about: A Meal Application featuring a landing page, meals page and a page to view saved meals. A user can search for a meal, see the details pertaining to the meal, save the meal and also view all saved meals for later use.
